$schema_note: Machine-readable designated regional area postcode ranges. Ranges are inclusive [from, to]; a singleton has from === to. category 2 = 'Cities & Major Regional Centres', category 3 = 'Regional Centres & Other Regional Areas'. BOTH categories count as designated-regional for subclass 491/494. A NSW postcode is regional iff it falls in any range below; otherwise it is Greater Sydney (non-regional).

source.authority: Australian Government, Department of Home Affairs
source.title: Designated regional area postcodes
source.disclaimer: Guidance only, not immigration advice. Verify against the source before relying on it.
